name: AWS IoT Core (MQTT)
description: A local MQTT broker emulating the AWS IoT Core message broker and devices registry. Connect and test publish/subscribe channels.

aws.parity: Publish/subscribe over MQTT locally exactly as devices will against IoT Core — same topics, QoS and payloads.
aws.deploy: Repoint your MQTT clients at your AWS IoT Core ATS endpoint and attach IoT policies/certs.

variables.label: MQTT Broker Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to bind the MQTT service broker.
